name: stageflow
description: Standardize Stageflow planning flows with durable request artifacts and validation gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan Codex work and expose the atomic-docs skill.
interface.longDescription: Stageflow helps Codex inspect a project, clarify requirements, preserve request-specific artifacts, review plans, require explicit approval, proceed from a validated plan, and expose an atomic-docs skill for storage-mode-aware atomic documentation that preserves user intent, implementation state, planned changes, gaps, source-code baselines, and graph relationships. It also exposes atomic-impl for docs-first implementation from approved atomic-docs requirements, and multi-repo-worktree for explicitly invoked multi-repo Git worktree bundle coordination with help, status, create, merge, and sync keywords.
defaultPrompt: Use Stageflow to plan this change before coding.
Use Stageflow to clarify this request and create a validated plan.
Use atomic-docs to create storage-mode-aware project documentation.
Use atomic-docs to refresh atom files from source-code changes.
Use atomic-docs to inspect intent, implementation, planned changes, and gaps.
Use atomic-impl to write requirements into atomic docs before implementing code.
Use multi-repo-worktree status to inspect a multi-repo Git worktree bundle.
